request_schema.note: Structure of each entry in open_requests
request_schema.task_id: string — task the tool is needed for, or empty
request_schema.delivered_tool_id: string — tool_id after delivery, or empty

tool_registry_schema.note: Structure of each entry in tool_registry
tool_registry_schema.tool_type: test_harness | code_generator | build_script | static_analysis | benchmark | mock | debug_aid | other
